title: Long Pond Gloves, 27" Long Rubber Gloves Elbow Length, Waterproof PVC Heavy Duty Rubber Glove, Reusable Full Arm Chemical Resistant Drain Cleaning Gauntlet Glove for ​Industry Gardening
features: Long Pond Gloves: You will receive a pair of long rubber gloves, 70cm/27in long and 1.1mm thick. The waterproof gloves are easy to put on and take off with an elasticated waistband at the top, which prevents the long rubber gloves from slipping off while working. These long gloves for cleaning are suitable for all hand types.

Premium Material: The chemical resistant gloves are made of high quality PVC waterproof material,which allows you to keep your hands dry while working and prevents your clothes from getting wet in a humid environment, and the lining is made of seamless cotton, providing maximum comfort in cold winter. Reusable and durable to keep your hands protected on the job.

Safety Protection: These PVC gauntlet gloves are chemical resistance, wear resistant, acid, alkali, oil, and various solvents. Extended cuffs provide effective barrier protection for wrist and forearm from splashes, abrasives and dangerous chemicals. Good puncture resistance, great for pruning roses, ivy, etc.
Excellent Grip: These heavy duty gloves are flexible and dexterous, providing a good grip, allowing you to easily hold onto wet or oily objects while working.

Wide Application: The long sleeve gloves are ideal choice for gardening, machine maintenance, forestry, agriculture, manufacturing, fishery, aquarium, chemical processing, printing and dyeing industry, leather industry, etc. Whether you are doing machine maintenance, pond work, car wash, garden pruning, drain cleaning work, you can use these long gloves.

Product Video Showcase Merchant video A Pair Of Long Rubber Gloves Designed To Protect Your Hands For the most extreme work conditions, would be your first choice when it comes to corrosion resistant and functional protection. Product Details Tear resistant Warm and dry PVC waterproof material Welding leakproof 27 Inch Reusable Work Gloves Long Waterproof Gloves Provide Better Protection When Cleaning the Fish Tank The chemical rubber gloves keep hands dry in any wet environment. In addition, the PVC long cuffs, soft and waterproof, and extended arms covered with cotton liners help to keep them comfortable, making them ideal for wet workplaces. Can be worn over thick cotton clothing The long sleeve protective gloves have a good elastic upper cuff, fit clothing, will not fall off. Tear resistant and not easy to crack The arm length gloves are made of high quality rubber material, high strength, not easy to damage, long service life. Great Gripping Ability The sandy textured design minimizes the amount of force required to grip dry, oil or wet tools and materials, reducing the stress on hands and arms caused by a poor grip, while also providing excellent abrasion resistance. Safety Work These long sleeves gloves are up to 27 inch long, and the design of the elastic cuff makes it stick to your arm, not easily falling off, serviceable and not easy to break, which can provide better protection for arms. The Long Sleeved Gloves For A Wide Range Of Environments Our long rubberized waterproof work gloves provide extra comfort and protection while working! The sandy surface allows you to control objects well. The most useful helper at work. Ideal warm water gloves to protect your hands from hot water, soap and detergents.
